title: TRIBAL GOVERNMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: BUREAU OF INDIAN AFFAIRS NORTHWEST REGION TRIBAL GOVERNMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Information and referral for Native American tribes in the Northwest to programs and services such as social services, natural resource and infrastructure maintenance and management, economic development programs, housing programs, law enforcement services, educational and vocational opportunities, court services, etc. 911 NE 11th Avenue Portland, OR 972324169 Eligibility: Tribal members or others who are in need of information Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 231-6702 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 231-6702 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUREAU OF INDIAN AFFAIRS NORTHWEST REGION
